_comment: Canonical output shape for a check-rule rule. Five detection scripts emit JSON envelopes — check_structure.py (3 rules), check_paths_glob.py (1), check_size.sh (1), check_prose.py (3), scan_secrets.py (1). Each script emits a single envelope or JSON array of envelopes. Schema: {rule_id, overall_status, findings[]} with each finding carrying status/location/reasoning/recommended_changes. recommended_changes is REQUIRED — non-empty with concrete repair guidance sourced from rule-best-practices.md.

findings.reasoning: Rule file lives outside the canonical .claude/rules/ tree. Claude Code only picks up rule files under .claude/rules/ (project) or ~/.claude/rules/ (user) — files at other paths sit invisible.
findings.recommended_changes: Move the file to .claude/rules/<name>.md (project-scoped) or ~/.claude/rules/<name>.md (user-scoped). The two locations are the only canonical paths Claude Code scans for rule files.
